description: For the woman with an modern, dynamic lifestyle, the floral fruity Rhythm from adidas is the right choice. Bottled in a pink flacon it has top notes of black currant and raspberry middle notes of cyclamen and freesia and base note of musk.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
